title: 5 Textile-Apparel Stocks Worth a Watch Despite Rising Inflation
text: The Zacks Textile - Apparel industry players are grappling with high input costs. Brand strength bodes well for Lululemon (LULU), Ralph Lauren (RL), Columbia Sportswear (COLM), PVH Corp. (PVH) and Under Armour (UAA).

title: Analyst names two retail stocks to buy for 2023
text: Retail analyst Dana Telsey remains constructive on select retail names for the coming year even though retail sales in November were weaker than expected. Telsey is bullish on Ralph Lauren Retail sales were down 0.6% last month versus a narrower 0.3% decline expected.

title: Ralph Lauren Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE: RL) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.75 per share on Ralph Lauren Corporation Common Stock. The dividend is payable on January 13, 2023 to shareholders of record at the close of business on December 30, 2022. ABOUT RALPH LAUREN Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL) is a global leader in the design, marketing, and distribution of luxury lifestyle products in five categories: apparel, footwear & accessories, home, fragrances and hospitality. For more than 50 years, Ralph Lauren has sought to inspire the dream of a better life through authenticity and timeless style. Its reputation and distinctive image have been developed across a wide range of products, brands, distribution channels, and international markets. The Company’s brand names – which include Ralph Lauren, Ralph Lauren Collection, Ralph Lauren Purple Label, Polo Ralph Lauren, Double RL, Lauren Ralph Lauren, Polo Ralph Lauren Children, and Chaps, among others – constitute one of the world’s most widely recognized families of consumer brands. For more information, go to https://investor.ralphlauren.com.

title: Time to Buy Lululemon (LULU) & Ralph Lauren (RL) Stock?
text: With it rarely being wise to bet against the U.S. economy or the strength of the nation's consumers, here are two apparel companies that could see year-end rallies and should be strong investments going into 2023.

title: Jim Cramer says these 3 apparel stocks benefit from return to office
text: Shares of PVH, the parent of Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger, surged on Thursday after the company reported better-than-expected results for its latest quarter.

title: Can Ralph Lauren Overcome a Slowing U.S. Business?
text: Ralph Lauren reported "better than expected" results in the fiscal second quarter, but that headline could be hiding a big weakness.
